prompt:
A 500 mL translucent plastic bottle with a narrow neck and dropper-style cap stands on a hydroponics bench, its contents a clear or faintly tinted liquid. The label uses a simple downward arrow and pH scale icon made of colored bars rather than any readable words, indicating a general-purpose pH down solution. A few droplets cling to the tip of the cap, and a nearby small beaker of nutrient solution shows gentle ripples as if a dose was just added.

The environment is a bright near-future solarpunk grow space with healthy plants, neatly arranged bottles, and soft, diffuse lighting. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with light stylization, free of logos or legible text, and composed so that the pH down bottle and small beaker are the primary focus while the rest of the hydroponic equipment and greenery remain softly blurred, reinforcing its role in fine-tuning nutrient pH.
